zh.Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾沙安 博瓦
zh.Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾姆 馬可爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma Walwyn於1483年出生在英國賀福爾姆 馬可爾時，她的父親Thomas Walwyn54歲，母親Agnes Milbourne48歲。她於1503年與William Cheyne在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1512年在英國巴金哈姆爾沙安享年29歲。

zh-hans.Chesham Bois, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾沙安 博瓦
zh-hans.Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England: 英国賀福爾姆 馬可爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma Walwyn于1483年出生在英国賀福爾姆 馬可爾时，她的父亲Thomas Walwyn54岁，母亲Agnes Milbourne48岁。她于1503年与William Cheyne在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1512年在英国巴金哈姆爾沙安享年29岁。

nameMeanings.name: Walwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wal(d)wine, which is of ancient Germanic origin, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘friend’.

from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Walweyn, Walwain. The central French form of this name is Gawain (see Gavin ). This name is found in the medieval Arthurian romances and is traditionally explained as an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps meaning ‘hawk of the plain’.

variants.name: Gavin
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Gábháin or Ó Gáibhín, both of which are derived from diminutives of gábhadh ‘want’ or ‘danger’ (the second being the more likely meaning here).

Scottish and northern English: from the personal name Gavin, Scottish form of English Gawain and French Gauvain . The name was introduced into English from French versions of the Arthurian romances, where this name was borne by one of the knights of the Round Table, brother of Galahad and Mordred and a nephew of Arthur. It has been taken to be an adaptation of the Welsh name Gwalchmei, perhaps ‘hawk of the plain’.
Scottish: shortened form of McGavin , which is believed to be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gobhann ‘son of the smith’.

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma Walwyn was born in 1483, in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, her father, Thomas Walwyn, was 54 and her mother, Agnes Milbourne, was 48. She married William Cheyne in 1503, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1512, in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma Walwyn est née en 1483, à Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Walwyn, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Agnes Milbourne, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé William Cheyne en 1503, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1512, à Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma Walwyn 1483 in Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Walwyn 54 und ihre Mutter Agnes Milbourne 48. Sie hat 1503 in Herefordshire, England William Cheyne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1512 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Walwyn è nata il nel 1483 nel Much Marcle, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Walwyn, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Agnes Milbourne, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato William Cheyne nel 1503, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1512, nel Chesham, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.Bath, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトバス

ja.lifeSummary: Emma Walwynが1483年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアムチ マルクルで生まれた時，父Thomas Walwynは54歳，母Agnes Milbourneは48歳であった。1503年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでWilliam Cheyneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1512年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチェシャムで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma Walwyn(이)가 1483년 영국 허퍼드실르 무치 마클에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Walwyn(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Milbourne(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1503년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 William Cheyne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 영국 벅잉함실르 체샤에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma Walwyn nasceu em 1483, em Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Walwyn, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Milbourne, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com William Cheyne em 1503, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1512, em Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma Walwyn родилась в 1483 г. в местности муч маркл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Walwyn было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Milbourne, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Cheyne в 1503 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1512 г. в местности чешам, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma Walwyn nació en 1483, en Much Marcle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Walwyn, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Agnes Milbourne, tenía 48 años. Se casó con William Cheyne en 1503, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1512, en Chesham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
